name: Alligator Push-Up
description: Start in a high plank position with feet together. Lower your body into a push-up while bringing your right knee toward your right elbow and shifting your weight forward. After pressing up, rock back into a low crouch with knees nearly touching the floor, arms straight, and head down. Then drive forward again into the next rep on the opposite side, crawling forward with each push-up.

media.caption: 3 Martial Arts-Inspired Exercises for Strength, Mobility & Agility
